title: EnvironmentZ Compats
description: A collection of block compatibilities between mods and EnvironmentZ
body:
## Common Compatibilies
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments)
- [Oxidized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oxidized)
- [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits)
- [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [Macaw's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges)
- [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted)
- [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) (Covers some blocks)
## 1.20.1 Compatibilities
- [[Let's Do] Beachparty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-beachparty)
- [[Let's Do] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow)
- [[Let's Do] Brewery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-brewery-farmcharm-compat)
- [[Let's Do] Candlelight](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-candlelight-farmcharm-compat)
- [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery)
- [[Let's Do] HerbalBrews](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews)
- [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs)
- [Decorative Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-blocks)
- [Wearable Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearable-lanterns)
- [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist)
- [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits)
- [Nethers Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight-refabricated/versions)
- [Powah! (Rearchitected)](https://modrinth.com/mod/powah) (Covers some blocks)

## Other EnvironmentZ Compatibilies
- [Environmentz + Terralith Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/environmentz-terralith-compat) 
- [Environmentz + The Bumblezone Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/environmentz-the-bumblezone-compat)
- [Environmentz + The Aether Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/environmentz-aether-compat)

### TO-DO
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- Possibly tune up [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) and [The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden)?

This datapack has not been forgotten, I am focusing on a [modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ad-astra-infected) currently
